title: Open-Audit Translation Registry Entry
description: Schema for a single translation registry entry.

contract_id.description: The Soroban contract address this entry applies to

topics.description: Ordered list of event topic names (the first is the event discriminant)

event_structure.description: Describes how the raw event's topics and data map to named, typed fields

topics.description: Fields extracted from event topics[1..] (topic[0] is the event name)

name.description: The field name used in the english_template

type.description: The Soroban type (address, i128, u32, symbol, bool, bytes)

data.description: The field extracted from the event data payload (if any)

name.description: The field name used in the english_template

type.description: The Soroban type (address, i128, u32, symbol, bool, bytes)

english_template.description: Human-readable template describing the event, using {field} placeholders
